title: UK Regulators Unveil Blueprint for Asset Tokenization in Wholesale Markets
message_html: UK Regulators Unveil Blueprint for Asset Tokenization in Wholesale Markets ...
snippet: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) and the Bank of England on Monday (May 18) issued a joint framework to accelerate tokenization within the U.K.’s wholesale financial markets. The initiative seeks to provide the regulatory and technical certainty institutional firms require to transition digital

title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
message_html: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions ...
snippet: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.
